why.title: Learn ICT with an ICT Background Expert
why.description: Discover the advantages of learning ICT with strong academic preparation and extensive teaching experience.
items: Long-term classroom experience with HSC ICT learners and practical exam preparation.
B.Sc in Computer Science and Engineering from Chittagong University of Engineering and Technology.
M.Sc in Information and Communication Technology from Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology.

items: Database Management System with hands-on practice.

faq.title: Everything You Need to Know Before Admission
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our courses, admission process, class format, and learning experience.
items: Our coaching centre is located at Parthib Niloy Tower (1st Floor), opposite Rainbow School, Jhiltuli, Faridpur.
Call our admission hotline to choose a suitable batch or visit our coaching centre directly.
Practical lessons are interactive, hands-on sessions using multimedia projectors.
Are classes available offline or online?
Yes. We offer both offline and online batches.
Yes. Students receive structured lecture sheets for every chapter.
